human_verification.notes: Validated casino-floor execution boundaries, regulator-grounded slot, table, comp, cashless, complaint, and self-exclusion sources, exception handling, validated packaging, and explicit specification-based runtime posture.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary is explicit to casino execution readiness, lifecycle progression, exception handling, and completion evidence rather than generic hospitality, compliance, surveillance, cage-credit, or dispute-adjudication work.

Authority sources anchor the pack in NIGC player-tracking, comp, and patron-account controls; Nevada slot and table MICS and ICP workflow references; and Nevada and New Jersey patron-complaint and self-exclusion artifacts.

Scenarios validate missing machine or table evidence, unsupported comp or player-account changes, self-exclusion stop conditions, patron disputes, generic-industry overreach, and requests to mark work complete without evidence.

The package requires named gaming records such as jackpot lockups, handpay records, fill-credit slips, player-tracking changes, patron complaint forms, and self-exclusion or approval artifacts before the lane can act.

review_notes: No unreviewed regressions were identified in the package artifacts.
Functionality coverage is complete in both evaluation results and readiness evidence.

notes: The specialist is validated as a spec pack and does not claim retained-implementation runtime behavior.

Promotion to a retained implementation should happen only after repeated production-like usage confirms stable retrieval of gaming-system, player-tracking, complaint, and responsible-gaming records with low false-confidence escalation rates.
